[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011110001 6
1 0101100101 5
2 1011111011 8
3 1111101111 9
4 1011111111 9
5 1111011011 8
6 1111011101 8
7 0001101111 6
